relevantGateDefinition: A contour-relevant gate is any gate that directly invalidates the admitted seams, proof obligations or invariants of contour 01.
externalBackgroundGateDefinition: An external-background gate may block broad repo-level runtime admission but does not invalidate contour 01 proof-only closure when admitted seams remain proven and runtime writes stay forbidden.
reasons: MIOS_FIRST_VERTICAL_SLICE_DEFINITION_RECORD_V1.json and MIOS_FIRST_VERTICAL_SLICE_EXECUTION_PROOF_RECORD_V1.json both exist and stay narrow.
The exact contour-01 proofhook and its contract test pass locally.
No red gate currently invalidates the admitted contour-01 seams, invariants or proof obligations.
Requested red gates remain repo-global or stale-sector admission background and therefore block broad runtime code admission, not proof-only closure.
notes: Runtime surface writes remain forbidden until a separate admission decision explicitly reopens the task.
If runtime writes are needed later, open one separate admission remediation task instead of mutating runtime surfaces under this proof-only closure.
